title: cynanchum undulatum
intro: Cynanchum undulatum, also known as Western Yellowneedle, is a perennial vine native to North America, belonging to the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum undulatum include relief from muscle spasms, menstrual cramps, and anxiety, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve heart health. Cynanchum undulatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", Cynanchum undulatum has an underutilized potential as an anti-diarrhoeic and spasmolytic remedy.
